name: Teagram Realtime Voice
description: Routes OpenClaw realtime voice (gateway-relay) to an external Pipecat speech-to-speech server (on-device Voxtral STT + LLM + TTS with heard-grounded barge-in).

url.description: Fallback WebSocket URL of the teagram Pipecat gateway server (per-session config normally comes from talk.realtime.providers.teagram.url), e.g. ws://127.0.0.1:7861/talk
